    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>

  </PropertyGroup>

</Project>

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a complete picture. Let me identify all the legacy patterns and modernize the project file.

Legacy patterns found:
1. **XML namespace and ToolsVersion** - `ToolsVersion="15.0"` and `xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003"` — SDK-style uses `<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">`
2. **Explicit Microsoft.Common.props import** — SDK-style handles this automatically
3. **Configuration/Platform conditionals** — Default Debug/Release configs are implicit in SDK-style
4. **ProjectGuid** — Not needed in SDK-style


5. **FileAlignment, AutoGenerateBindingRedirects, and Deterministic** — All defaults in SDK-style
6. **Debug/Release PropertyGroups** — The values shown are defaults and can be removed
7. **Explicit System.* references and Compile includes** — SDK-style uses implicit globbing and doesn't require these
8. **Microsoft.CSharp.targets import and Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs** — SDK handles both automatically

, with metadata moving directly into the .csproj
9. **TargetFrameworkVersion v4.7.2** — I'll convert this to `TargetFramework: net472` and modernize the project file accordingly.

  </PropertyGroup>

    <Compile Include="Properties\AssemblyInfo.cs" />

</Project>

data.content:
Here's a summary of the **12 legacy patterns** removed and how they were simplified:

| Legacy Pattern | Resolution |
|---|---|
| `ToolsVersion` + XML namespace | Replaced with `Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk"` |
| `Import Microsoft.Common.props` | Implicit in SDK-style |
| `Import Microsoft.CSharp.targets` | Implicit in SDK-style |
| `Configuration`/`Platform` conditionals | SDK defaults handle Debug/Release |
| `ProjectGuid` | Not needed in SDK-style |
| `OutputType Library` | Default for SDK class libraries |
| `FileAlignment`, `Deterministic`, `AutoGenerateBindingRedirects` | SDK defaults |
| Debug/Release `PropertyGroup` blocks (OutputPath, DebugType, Optimize, etc.) | All values match SDK defaults |
| Explicit `<Reference>` for System.\* assemblies | Implicit for .NET Framework in SDK-style |
| Explicit `<Compile Include="...">` items | SDK-style uses automatic file globbing |
| `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` | Metadata moved to `<PropertyGroup>` (Description, Company, Copyright, Version); SDK auto-generates assembly attributes |
| `TargetFrameworkVersion v4.7.2` | Simplified to `<TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>` |

The project went from **47 lines → 13 lines** while preserving all behavior.
